[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0101000100 3
1 0011010000 3
2 0110110000 4
3 1000000001 2
4 0010000000 1
5 0000000010 1
6 0001001001 3
7 0001111000 4

37 0001001001 3 match 6
